text.message: That sheep port play looks so fun 😂
Yeah, pretty obvious first pick
Do it!
really no choice.  I'm finishing in last place...
black you will have a lock on army I think.
Lol I meant the sheep port + sheep pile
Thats what I would do in 4th
Yeah I would’ve done the same
Yeah, that's what I thought he was gonna do to
I wish I didn’t have 1st pick lol
Yeah, I considered that, but it's just two weak with all wheat except the two brick
I was more considering the 5-10-4
Yeah what you did wasn’t bad either
I mean it’s all RNG with these dice anyways 😂
Well, black gets all that sheep now
Damn black, was hoping you’d take the sheep pile 😂
Oh, ok...damn...OJ has massive massive production
Orange getting an unbelievable last pick
I know
How much sheep is too much sheep….
Red, with all your devs you better check oj
Cause you gave him this sweetheart last pick
I’ll be down to trade brick when I get my first settle
Well I can’t trade brick now 😂
Im on 2…
Yeah, oj had no cards
Unbelievable
Blue just can’t miss a roll
So blue and red both on non knights
I don’t want to do this trade with blue
So if you don’t 1-1 it I might have to
